nasb.text: Though you pound a fool in a mortar with a pestle along with crushed grain, Yet his foolishness will not depart from him.

esv.text: Crush a fool in a mortar with a pestle along with crushed grain, yet his folly will not depart from him.

cnv.text: 你雖然用杵把愚妄人與碎穀一同搗在臼中， 他的愚妄還是離不了他。

ccb.text: 就算把愚人放在臼里与麦子一起捣碎， 他仍然难脱愚昧。

csbs.text: 就算用杵将愚妄人与麦子一同捣碎在石臼中， 他的愚妄还是不会离开他。
